content: cycle 1: trying tfidf_lightgbm (tier=baseline) — reason: SMOKE_TEST (family_stats empty). Domain-informed feature set per domain_notes.

Durability pass: propagated canonical facts (JSONL not CSV; StratifiedGroupKFold group=session seed=42; 14 string action labels; quota 20/day team; package_submit.py ships model+script.py+requirements.txt+features.py) and anti-patterns (A foreground/wait, B thread-cap<=16, C char_wb TF-IDF stall) across skills dev/auto/eval/run/eda/plan/rank/status/submit-result + agents model-developer/experiment-runner + data_docs Modeling Protocol. Added real-time train.log Tee convention. Created 6 wiki lessons + 2 decisions and updated wiki index. Final grep clean (only legit CSV reads + KFold prohibition text remain).

summary: OOF error analysis: macroF1=0.6606 top1=0.673 top2=0.837 top3=0.921; worst classes list_directory/read_file/web_search; 3 block-diagonal confusion clusters (read-search, execution, dialogue); within-read/search-cluster errors=55.4% of all errors; ~10.6% errors irreducible (identical-prompt multi-label); exact-prompt ceiling 0.96 is memorization artifact (94% unique prompts).
top_levers: per-class threshold calibration to Macro-F1 (top2 acc 0.84 >> top1 0.67)
